blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Sort control and reordering behavior were observable, but required null-bottom proof for assessed values could not be validated because available datasets did not include mixed null/non-null assessed values in a single test surface.
Permit value sorting interaction worked, but required null-bottom proof could not be completed because no dataset exposed mixed null/non-null permit values within the same rendered table surface.

appliedUpdates.description: Added dashboard-round data caveat documenting that current main/fixture datasets do not provide mixed null/non-null assessedValue/permitValue surfaces, which can block null-bottom sort-order assertions.
